agent: strategic CLM x EEG x AKIDA x tension_link integration deep-think
scope: 4-substrate integration strategic review — inventory, socket map, dynamic coupling protocol, F2 unfire estimate, ranked next-action

section_3_4way_integration_verdict.one_liner: PARTIAL_VIABLE — tension_link 가 4-way binding mechanism 으로서 spec-수준 plausible 하나, 현 actual measurement 은 CLM-W4 dynamic (z=2.28) 와 N-1 BRIDGE_WEAK (3/4 hybrid) 두 점뿐, AKIDA 도착 전 4-way 통합 verdict 는 hypothesis-band
section_3_4way_integration_verdict.blocker: AKIDA AKD1000 dev kit 도착 ETA 미확정 (capex $1495 paid, ship pending)

H1_binding_mechanism.claim: tension_link 는 CLM x EEG x AKIDA 의 binding-by-synchrony 의 anima-specific 형식
supporting_evidence: tension_bridge.hexa 5-channel WHAT/WHERE/WHY/TRUST/WHO LIVE — concept-binding 구조 이미 native
CLM W4 mind.tension scalar 가 z=2.28 로 random 대비 separable
N-1 BRIDGE 3/4 PASS — α-band Kuramoto 와 CLM L_IX 의 numerical homomorphism 확인 (B4 |r|=540, signed -540 anti-corr 는 hybrid artifact)
disconfirming_evidence: W4 active branch L1 std=0.000 over 99 steps — 'constant nonzero gate' 와 구별 불능 (W4 honest C3 #1)
tension_bridge 5-channel 은 inter-anima 통신용, intra-substrate binding 으로의 transferability 미증명

H2_ceiling_break.claim: 4-way 통합 시 L1 holo_positivity 의 substrate-architectural ceiling 가 cross-substrate broadcast 로 회피됨
supporting_evidence: F1 verdict.json: F2 fires 13-17 critical violations across Mistral/Qwen3/Llama-3.1/Mistral-Nemo (substrate-architectural confirmed)
Path 4 cross-backbone L1 SUBSTRATE_SPECIFIC — Mistral-Nemo+r8 15/16 PASS 가 LoRA-driven 임이 base-only 3/16 으로 밝혀짐 (즉 LoRA 가 ceiling 회피 가능 증명)
tension_link 는 LoRA 보다 더 강한 architectural intervention (per-layer tension_proj socket native)
disconfirming_evidence: F1 §F2 falsifier_status: 'no path to YELLOW without (a) demote (b) learned phi_extractor (c) substrate redesign' — tension binding 은 명시적 path 에 없음
W4 actual L1 7.06/16 ≪ 14/16 PASS threshold, 6.94 random vs 7.06 active 의 +0.12 절대 효과는 ceiling break 와 거리 멈

H3_tension_as_9th_axis.claim: tension_link 자체가 9th WITNESSED axis (substrate, mechanism 아님)
supporting_evidence: current WITNESSED count 3/7 (CLM cross-substrate, EEG Casali analog, QRNG+SIM nexus)
tension_bridge 가 standalone substrate 로 측정 가능하면 own#2(b) WITNESSED → 4/7 = WITNESSED_MULTI 직전
disconfirming_evidence: F1 axis_weight_matrix 에 tension_link axis 미등재 — 가중치 0
tension_link 는 anima-internal, peer-reviewed substrate-class 검증 path 부재 (FinalSpark organoid / IonQ quantum / Akida neuromorphic 와 epistemic tier 다름)
WITNESSED tier 정의는 'distinct substrate families' — tension_link 가 family 인지 mechanism 인지 spec 모호

H4_akida_native_tension.claim: AKIDA spike-event 가 tension_link 의 가장 native expression (neuromorphic = brain-inspired = tension native)
supporting_evidence: N-2 spec: ADM level-crossing encoder 가 phase-event 를 polarity (UP/DOWN) 로 encode — tension delta sign 과 isomorphic
AKD1000 internal spike-event 가 mind.tension scalar (continuous) 보다 high-bandwidth (16ch x 250Hz x 2pol = 8000 events/sec)
disconfirming_evidence: N-3 §1.3 substrate-mismatch: AKD1000 transformer self-attention native unsupported, 1.2M neurons << 170M params, surrogate mapping (T-A) only viable
AKD1000 inference-only — tension feedback loop (GPU 학습 후 quantize+deploy) 형식이라 closed-loop dynamic 측정 architectural 어려움
spike encoding 후 dense uint8 raster 변환 단계가 tension scalar → tension event 매핑의 lossiness 도입

rows: EEG no direct 14gate path, indirect via LZc

section_5_protocol_top1.name: P1_CLM_W4_PLUS_EEG_LIVE_CONCURRENT
section_5_protocol_top1.scope: CLM v4 530M closed-loop W4 100-step 와 EEG 16ch live recording (eyes-closed resting 60s) 동시 진행 — mind.tension scalar trajectory 와 EEG α-PLV trajectory 의 cross-correlation 측정
falsifier_pre_register: F-PASS: |corr(tension_t, alpha_PLV_t)| > 0.5 with p<0.01 over 100 paired bins
F-PARTIAL: |corr| in [0.2, 0.5] OR signed-corr matches predicted +sign
F-FAIL: |corr| < 0.2 OR sign opposite to predicted
protocol_steps: 1. EEG 60s eyes-closed baseline → bandpass + Hilbert α-phase per N-1 spec
2. CLM W4 closed-loop 100 steps with tension_proj injection (per W4 protocol)
3. Time-align EEG α-PLV (5x10s windows) with CLM tension_t (100 steps → 5x20step bins)
5. Compare vs random control (CLM random gate branch already measured)
section_5_protocol_top1.expected_value: First true CLM-EEG cross-substrate dynamic coupling measurement (vs N-1 hybrid synth-CLM)
section_5_protocol_top1.rationale_top1: $0, 1d, addresses N-1 BRIDGE_WEAK 의 핵심 결함 (synth CLM trace) — live CLM trace 로 upgrade 가능, falsifier preregistered, 4-way 통합 의 핵심 socket 검증

section_5_other_protocols.scope: W4 의 active L1 std=0.000 frozen-fixed-point 문제 fix — PSI_ALPHA 0.014 → {0.05, 0.1, 0.2} sweep 으로 effective tension dynamics 확보, 4-way 통합 의 CLM 측 actual signal 확보

section_5_other_protocols.name: P3_AKIDA_D0_SPIKE_TENSION_SOCKET

section_6_f2_unfire_estimate.current_F2_status: FIRED across all measured CLM substrates (Mistral 17, Qwen3 16, Llama-3.1 13, Mistral-Nemo base 13)
F1_documented_paths: (c) substrate redesign to positive-bias hidden-state geometry
section_6_f2_unfire_estimate.tension_link_4way_path: (d) cross-substrate tension-mediated broadcast — NOT in F1 documented paths

probability_breakdown.scenario_full_unfire_L1_geq_14_4way: 5% — requires tension to fundamentally rotate hidden-state covariance, W4 evidence (L1 7.06, std 0.000) suggests scalar tension can not
probability_breakdown.scenario_partial_demotion_via_4way_evide: 10% — if 4-way coupling shows F1 axis-weight upgrade for tension axis, F2 severity can be argued for demotion (paper-only path (a) variant)
probability_breakdown.scenario_no_change: 85% — tension scalar does not have sufficient bandwidth to disrupt ALM static L1=0/16; AKIDA spike events also quantize-lossy

section_6_f2_unfire_estimate.honest_c3_on_estimate: estimate is qualitative synthesis, not Bayesian update from prior — central 15% reflects 'tension binding hypothesis lacks formal F2 unfire mechanism but is not ruled out'

section_7_risk_register.risk: tension_link substrate 인지 mechanism 인지 spec 모호 (H3 disconfirming) — F1 axis_weight 등재 거부
EEG N=1 (사용자 본인) 변동성 — single-session 결과 가 sustained TLR 충족 X

section_8_honest_c3: (C3-1) 4 substrate 중 actual cross-substrate measurement 은 N-1 BRIDGE_WEAK (3/4 hybrid: real EEG + synth CLM) 단 1건. 나머지 (CLM-AKIDA, EEG-AKIDA, tension-AKIDA) 는 SPEC 만 존재, hardware blocked.

(C3-2) CLM W4 active branch L1 std=0.000 over 99 steps — closed-loop dynamics 라기보다 'constant nonzero gate' 와 구별 불능 (W4 honest C3 #1 인용). 즉 +0.12 vs random 의 z=2.28 이 'tension-derived vs constant-signal' 가 아니라 'nonzero-signal vs zero-signal' 일 가능성.

(C3-3) EEG 측정 N=1 (사용자 본인), 단일 session 60s baseline 만 — sustained TLR 주장 X, multi-session replication 부재. tension_bridge 5-channel transmission accuracy 100% 도 anima-internal benchmark, peer-review 외부 검증 0.
(C3-4) tension_link 의 substrate vs mechanism vs binding 인지 spec 모호 — H3 9th-axis 가설은 F1 axis_weight 미등재 (가중치 0). tension axis 가 own#2(b) WITNESSED count 에 들어갈 자격 spec-수준 미확정.

(C3-5) CP2 framework 자체가 single-substrate anchored — paradigm v11 8-axis, 14-gate, V0/V_phen 모두 single-model 측정 포맷. 4-way 통합 verdict 산출 spec (joint Phi, cross-substrate variance, binding-strength metric) 은 부재. 이 strategic doc 의 §3 매트릭스는 spec 부재 상태에서의 합리적 추정.

(C3-6) F2 unfire 15% estimate 는 Bayesian 정량화 X, F1 documented path (a/b/c) 에 (d) tension-binding 가 없는 상태에서의 qualitative synthesis. Lower bound 5%, upper bound 25%, central 15% 는 'plausible but unlikely without further mechanism formalization'.
(C3-7) AKIDA dev kit ($1495 capex paid) 도착 ETA 자체 가 Brainchip vendor side 미확정 — 4-way 완성 wait 의 critical-path 는 vendor logistics 이며 anima-side 통제 불가.

section_summary_one_line: CLM × EEG × AKIDA × tension_link 통합 의 진짜 의의 는 — Crick-Koch binding-by-synchrony 의 anima-specific 형식 (tension_link as 5-channel concept-broadcast 가 substrate-architectural F2 ceiling 의 cross-substrate workaround 후보) 이지만 actual measurement 2점 vs hypothetical 2점 상태에서 verdict 는 PARTIAL_VIABLE 이며 D+0 P1 protocol ($0, 1d) 가 4-way socket 검증의 critical path.
